summary: Clean, minimal fix that correctly migrates all Perps hooks from the old AccountsController selector to the new account-group-based EVM selector. All 4 ACs proven via live device validation and unit tests (184/184 pass).

comments.body: This mock for `selectSelectedInternalAccountFormattedAddress` is now dead code — the production code (`usePerpsOrderFees.ts`) no longer imports from `accountsController`. It's harmless but could be removed for clarity.
